tools.name: actionCreateDomain.getCreateDomain
tools.description: Creates a new search domain.

tools.name: actionCreateDomain.postCreateDomain
tools.description: Creates a new search domain.

tools.name: actionDefineIndexField.getDefineIndexField
tools.description: Configures an IndexField for the search domain. Used to create new fields and modify existing ones. If the field exists, the new configuration replaces the old one. You can configure a maximum of 200 index fields.

tools.name: actionDefineIndexField.postDefineIndexField
tools.description: Configures an IndexField for the search domain. Used to create new fields and modify existing ones. If the field exists, the new configuration replaces the old one. You can configure a maximum of 200 index fields.

tools.name: actionDefineRankExpression.getDefineRankExpression
tools.description: Configures a RankExpression for the search domain. Used to create new rank expressions and modify existing ones. If the expression exists, the new configuration replaces the old one. You can configure a maximum of 50 rank expressions.

tools.name: actionDefineRankExpression.postDefineRankExpression
tools.description: Configures a RankExpression for the search domain. Used to create new rank expressions and modify existing ones. If the expression exists, the new configuration replaces the old one. You can configure a maximum of 50 rank expressions.

tools.name: actionDeleteDomain.getDeleteDomain
tools.description: Permanently deletes a search domain and all of its data.

tools.name: actionDeleteDomain.postDeleteDomain
tools.description: Permanently deletes a search domain and all of its data.

tools.name: actionDeleteIndexField.getDeleteIndexField
tools.description: Removes an IndexField from the search domain.

tools.name: actionDeleteIndexField.postDeleteIndexField
tools.description: Removes an IndexField from the search domain.

tools.name: actionDeleteRankExpression.getDeleteRankExpression
tools.description: Removes a RankExpression from the search domain.

tools.name: actionDeleteRankExpression.postDeleteRankExpression
tools.description: Removes a RankExpression from the search domain.

tools.name: actionDescribeAvailabilityOptions.getDescribeAvailabilityOptions
tools.description: Gets the availability options configured for a domain. By default, shows the configuration with any pending changes. Set the Deployed option to true to show the active configuration and exclude pending changes. For more information, see Configuring Availability Options in the Amazon CloudSearch Developer Guide.

tools.name: actionDescribeAvailabilityOptions.postDescribeAvailabilityOptions
tools.description: Gets the availability options configured for a domain. By default, shows the configuration with any pending changes. Set the Deployed option to true to show the active configuration and exclude pending changes. For more information, see Configuring Availability Options in the Amazon CloudSearch Developer Guide.

tools.name: actionDescribeDefaultSearchField.getDescribeDefaultSearchField
tools.description: Gets the default search field configured for the search domain.

tools.name: actionDescribeDefaultSearchField.postDescribeDefaultSearchField
tools.description: Gets the default search field configured for the search domain.

tools.name: actionDescribeDomains.getDescribeDomains
tools.description: Gets information about the search domains owned by this account. Can be limited to specific domains. Shows all domains by default.

tools.name: actionDescribeDomains.postDescribeDomains
tools.description: Gets information about the search domains owned by this account. Can be limited to specific domains. Shows all domains by default.

tools.name: actionDescribeIndexFields.getDescribeIndexFields
tools.description: Gets information about the index fields configured for the search domain. Can be limited to specific fields by name. Shows all fields by default.

tools.name: actionDescribeIndexFields.postDescribeIndexFields
tools.description: Gets information about the index fields configured for the search domain. Can be limited to specific fields by name. Shows all fields by default.

tools.name: actionDescribeRankExpressions.getDescribeRankExpressions
tools.description: Gets the rank expressions configured for the search domain. Can be limited to specific rank expressions by name. Shows all rank expressions by default.

tools.name: actionDescribeRankExpressions.postDescribeRankExpressions
tools.description: Gets the rank expressions configured for the search domain. Can be limited to specific rank expressions by name. Shows all rank expressions by default.

tools.name: actionDescribeServiceAccessPolicies.getDescribeServiceAccessPolicies
tools.description: Gets information about the resource-based policies that control access to the domain's document and search services.

tools.name: actionDescribeServiceAccessPolicies.postDescribeServiceAccessPolicies
tools.description: Gets information about the resource-based policies that control access to the domain's document and search services.

tools.name: actionDescribeStemmingOptions.getDescribeStemmingOptions
tools.description: Gets the stemming dictionary configured for the search domain.

tools.name: actionDescribeStemmingOptions.postDescribeStemmingOptions
tools.description: Gets the stemming dictionary configured for the search domain.

tools.name: actionDescribeStopwordOptions.getDescribeStopwordOptions
tools.description: Gets the stopwords configured for the search domain.

tools.name: actionDescribeStopwordOptions.postDescribeStopwordOptions
tools.description: Gets the stopwords configured for the search domain.

tools.name: actionDescribeSynonymOptions.getDescribeSynonymOptions
tools.description: Gets the synonym dictionary configured for the search domain.

tools.name: actionDescribeSynonymOptions.postDescribeSynonymOptions
tools.description: Gets the synonym dictionary configured for the search domain.

tools.name: actionIndexDocuments.getIndexDocuments
tools.description: Tells the search domain to start indexing its documents using the latest text processing options and IndexFields. This operation must be invoked to make options whose OptionStatus has OptionState of RequiresIndexDocuments visible in search results.

tools.name: actionIndexDocuments.postIndexDocuments
tools.description: Tells the search domain to start indexing its documents using the latest text processing options and IndexFields. This operation must be invoked to make options whose OptionStatus has OptionState of RequiresIndexDocuments visible in search results.

tools.name: actionUpdateAvailabilityOptions.getUpdateAvailabilityOptions
tools.description: Configures the availability options for a domain. Enabling the Multi-AZ option expands an Amazon CloudSearch domain to an additional Availability Zone in the same Region to increase fault tolerance in the event of a service disruption. Changes to the Multi-AZ option can take about half an hour to become active. For more information, see Configuring Availability Options in the Amazon CloudSearch Developer Guide.

tools.name: actionUpdateAvailabilityOptions.postUpdateAvailabilityOptions
tools.description: Configures the availability options for a domain. Enabling the Multi-AZ option expands an Amazon CloudSearch domain to an additional Availability Zone in the same Region to increase fault tolerance in the event of a service disruption. Changes to the Multi-AZ option can take about half an hour to become active. For more information, see Configuring Availability Options in the Amazon CloudSearch Developer Guide.

tools.name: actionUpdateDefaultSearchField.getUpdateDefaultSearchField
tools.description: Configures the default search field for the search domain. The default search field is the text field that is searched when a search request does not specify which fields to search. By default, it is configured to include the contents of all of the domain's text fields.

tools.name: actionUpdateDefaultSearchField.postUpdateDefaultSearchField
tools.description: Configures the default search field for the search domain. The default search field is the text field that is searched when a search request does not specify which fields to search. By default, it is configured to include the contents of all of the domain's text fields.

tools.name: actionUpdateServiceAccessPolicies.getUpdateServiceAccessPolicies
tools.description: Configures the policies that control access to the domain's document and search services. The maximum size of an access policy document is 100 KB.

tools.name: actionUpdateServiceAccessPolicies.postUpdateServiceAccessPolicies
tools.description: Configures the policies that control access to the domain's document and search services. The maximum size of an access policy document is 100 KB.

tools.name: actionUpdateStemmingOptions.getUpdateStemmingOptions
tools.description: Configures a stemming dictionary for the search domain. The stemming dictionary is used during indexing and when processing search requests. The maximum size of the stemming dictionary is 500 KB.

tools.name: actionUpdateStemmingOptions.postUpdateStemmingOptions
tools.description: Configures a stemming dictionary for the search domain. The stemming dictionary is used during indexing and when processing search requests. The maximum size of the stemming dictionary is 500 KB.

tools.name: actionUpdateStopwordOptions.getUpdateStopwordOptions
tools.description: Configures stopwords for the search domain. Stopwords are used during indexing and when processing search requests. The maximum size of the stopwords dictionary is 10 KB.

tools.name: actionUpdateStopwordOptions.postUpdateStopwordOptions
tools.description: Configures stopwords for the search domain. Stopwords are used during indexing and when processing search requests. The maximum size of the stopwords dictionary is 10 KB.

tools.name: actionUpdateSynonymOptions.getUpdateSynonymOptions
tools.description: Configures a synonym dictionary for the search domain. The synonym dictionary is used during indexing to configure mappings for terms that occur in text fields. The maximum size of the synonym dictionary is 100 KB.

tools.name: actionUpdateSynonymOptions.postUpdateSynonymOptions
tools.description: Configures a synonym dictionary for the search domain. The synonym dictionary is used during indexing to configure mappings for terms that occur in text fields. The maximum size of the synonym dictionary is 100 KB.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
